overall.description: Spider-Man crouches on a high-rise building ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-inspired urban canyon in a video game environment. Bright midday sunlight illuminates glass skyscrapers covered in digital billboards, while traffic and pedestrians move through the streets far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking major commercial intersection

events.description: Spider-Man shifts weight forward slightly while maintaining crouch position on the ledge

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouches perched on the building ledge, surveying the city street below with slight idle movements

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving down the multi-lane street below

entered.detail: Tall glass building with vertical architectural details where Spider-Man is perched
Modern skyscraper covered in large digital screens displaying colorful advertisements
Large prominent red billboard with Spider-Man imagery visible down the street canyon
Multi-lane street with crosswalks, traffic lights, and moving vehicles running between skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: From a high vantage point on a glass skyscraper ledge, Spider-Man overlooks a vibrant urban canyon resembling Times Square. Digital billboards cover the surrounding modern architecture, while traffic flows through the streets below and pedestrians navigate the crosswalks. The character maintains a crouched, observant posture with minor shifts in weight, surveying the bustling city scene bathed in bright midday sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, high-altitude perspective that emphasizes the scale of a vibrant urban canyon bathed in bright midday sunlight. It begins with a close focus on Spider-Man in a crouched, observant posture on a glass skyscraper ledge, where he makes minor shifts in weight while surveying the city. As the camera lingers, the view expands to reveal the surrounding modern architecture draped in glowing digital billboards. The scene then opens further to encompass the depths of the street below, where traffic flows steadily and pedestrians navigate the crosswalks of the bustling metropolis.
